title: 開運☆ハッピーちゃんこ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm passing by the cafeteria, I see
Copano Rickey surrounded by a copious volume
of sumo stew.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer! Actually...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In feng shui, seasonal ingredients are the basis of
good fortune. ♪ Also, different ingredients are
recommended based on how exactly you want to
improve your luck.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ooh, like what?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
First up—ingredients that help your money
fortune! Apparently, yellow foods like eggs and
fried tofu are best.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you want to be lucky health-wise, green foods
are the way to go, though. Finally, miso soup is
like the ultimate option—it'll boost every kind of
luck!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's amazing! And miso-flavored sumo
stew might taste really good!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I like the sound of that! Why don't we make it
together?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So, here it is!
choice_data_list: But still, this is a lot of stew...
But still, this is a lot of stew...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but having this much means there's more
happiness to go around! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Bigger is better—for food and fortune!
Everything's buono and happy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything may be buono and happy, but I still
think this is too much stew for the number of
mouths we have...
choice_data_list: Let's share this good fortune with everyone!
Eat up and boost your luck!
Eat up and boost your luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everything may be buono and happy, but I still
think this is too much stew for the number of
mouths we have...
choice_data_list: Let's share this good fortune with everyone!
Eat up and boost your luck!
Eat up and boost your luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! What a great idea! We really should share
this happiness with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Come and get your luck-boosting stew! If your
tummy's rumbling, eat up and you'll be happy in
no time! It's our treat!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Luck-boosting stew? ...And it's their treat?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Oguri! How about trying some of our
good-luck stew? It'll make you happy!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sure, sounds great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We share the sumo stew with everyone—with the
bulk of it going to Oguri Cap—and have a great
time filling ourselves up.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Okay! Time to top up my stomach and my luck! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Your sumo stew really is the best, Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My stomach's full of happiness!
Okay, I'm ready for my seventh serving!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey continues to chow down on the
stew. She eats so much that she ends up
temporarily immobile, but at least she's boosted
her luck... probably?
